extensions.summary: Derived-only parallel work is allowed when merged output is canonicalized before hashing or persistence.

stability.rationale: Parallel derived output is safe only when the merge utility and ordering discipline remain explicit and versioned.
stability.replacement_target: Replace MVP derived-only concurrency policy with release-pinned shard and renderer worker envelopes.

extensions.summary: Validation and audit orchestration may run concurrently when result ordering is canonicalized before reduction.

stability.rationale: Parallel validation is safe only when result reduction and reporting are canonically ordered.
stability.replacement_target: Replace MVP validation concurrency policy with target-tier-specific worker policies after concurrency envelopes are frozen.

extensions.summary: Default authoritative policy; all governed execution remains single-threaded.

stability.rationale: Single-thread authoritative execution is the MVP baseline and keeps truth invariance explicit while shard merge is not yet formalized.
stability.replacement_target: Replace MVP single-thread default with per-domain shard execution policies only after deterministic merge contracts exist.
